nevada.regulatory_summary: Nevada requires advance notification for laser operations. Part of comprehensive state laser safety contacts directory.
key_requirements: Advance notification required for laser operations
Contact Radiation Control Program before installation/use

new-york.regulatory_body: NYS Dept. of Labor Radiological Health Unit

key_contact.name: Kirk Fisher
key_contact.title: Radiophysicist
key_contact.address: State Campus Building 12 Room 169 Albany, NY 12240

new-york.regulatory_summary: New York has Industrial Code Rule 50 under Title 12 (12 NYCRR Part 50), amended 3/2/94. State requires training certification for laser operators.
key_requirements: Class A Certificate for low intensity lasers
Class B Certificate for low and high intensity lasers

training_providers.name: NY District Council of Carpenters Labor Technical College

texas.regulatory_body: Department of State Health Services Radiation Safety Licensing Branch

key_contact.name: Shannon Dove-Edson
key_contact.title: Program Manager, Laser Registration Program
key_contact.address: 1100 W. 49th Street, Mail Code 2835 Austin, TX 78756-3189

texas.regulatory_summary: Texas has extensive laser regulations including specific requirements for laser hair removal devices and intense-pulsed light devices. ILDA comments indicate significant industry engagement regarding light show regulations.
key_requirements: 25 TAC 289.301 - Registration and Radiation Safety Requirements for Lasers and Intense-Pulsed Light Devices
25 TAC 289.302 - Registration and Radiation Safety Requirements for Laser Hair Removal Devices

special_notes.light_shows: ILDA comments indicate discussions about exempting or modifying requirements for laser light shows
special_notes.out_of_state: Requirements for out-of-state operators under review
special_notes.fda_alignment: Texas considers piggybacking off FDA variance requirements

texas.note: Original file was DOCX format containing ILDA regulatory comments

washington.regulatory_body: X-Ray Control Department of Health/Radiation Protection
washington.regulatory_summary: Washington follows State rules Ch. 296-62-09005 WAC. Requires advance written notification for light shows.
key_requirements: Advance written notification for laser light shows
Contact Radiation Protection office for registration requirements
